case_title: FILOUS JOE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FILOUS JOE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILOUS JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $958.00, LOSS OF USE $50 X 9 = $450 DEDUCTIBLE $500 = $950 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
